---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with Image 2 Text so it can be reproduced and fixed.
title: "[BUG]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open Image 2 Text
2. Click on '...'
3. ...
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / recording**
If applicable, attach screenshots or a short screen recording.

**Environment**
- Image 2 Text version: [e.g. 1.0.0, shown in About panel]
- Install source: [Microsoft Store / sideloaded MSIX / source build]
- Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2, run `winver`]
- Architecture: [x64 / ARM64]
- Display setup: [e.g. single 1080p 100% / dual monitor mixed DPI 100% + 150%]

**Input that triggered the bug**
- [ ] Screen capture
- [ ] Uploaded image (format: ____, size: ____ x ____)
- [ ] Uploaded PDF (pages: ____, scanned / digital text-layer / mixed)
- [ ] Batch (item count: ____)

**OCR settings at the time**
- Page Layout: [Auto / Single Column / Single Block / Sparse Text]
- Auto-enhance: [On / Off]

**Debug log (highly recommended)**
1. Settings panel, enable "Debug Mode"
2. Reproduce the bug
3. Debug panel, Export, Export as TXT (or CSV)
4. Paste the contents below, or attach the file

```
<paste debug log here>
```

**Crash log (if the app crashed or did not start)**
Open this file in Explorer and attach or paste the relevant section:
`%LOCALAPPDATA%\Image2Text\crash.log`

```
<paste crash log here>
```

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant: source image (privacy permitting), unusual filenames, antivirus / network state, etc.
